# Project Context: session-continuity

<!-- Auto-generated by /cortex-spec from spec artifacts. -->
<!-- All agents reference this file for project-level conventions. -->

## Tech Stack

- **Shell (bash)** — all hook scripts; must be POSIX-compatible with `set -uo pipefail`
- **jq ≥1.6** — JSON parsing of hook stdin payload
- **claude CLI (Haiku)** — `claude-haiku-4-5-20251001` for summarization; invoked via `claude -p`
- **Claude Code hook system** — PreCompact, SessionEnd, SessionStart events

## Conventions

- Hook scripts live in `~/.claude/hooks/` and are registered in `~/.claude/settings.json`
- Hook scripts source `cortex-supervisor-log.sh` for event logging
- All file writes use tmp+rename pattern for atomicity
- Hook scripts soft-fail silently (`exit 0` on error); never crash the session
- Session-memory file is per-project at `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cortex/session-memory.md`
- Haiku calls use `claude -p "{prompt}"` or pipe via stdin
- Budget guard: session-memory content injected into additionalContext capped at 800 chars

## Architecture Rules

- LLM calls happen at write time (hook events), never at read time (session start)
- `.cortex/session-memory.md` is system-owned — developer-authored CLAUDE.md is never modified
- PreCompact may block (exit code 2) until snapshot is written; max timeout 10s
- SessionEnd is fire-and-forget (output ignored by Claude Code)
- Graceful degradation: missing `.cortex/session-memory.md` is not an error

## Write Boundaries

- `~/.claude/hooks/precompact-session-snapshot.sh` (new)
- `~/.claude/hooks/sessionend-session-summary.sh` (new)
- `~/.claude/hooks/cortex-session-start.sh` (modify — add session-memory read)
- `~/.claude/settings.json` (modify — add/move hook registrations)
- `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.cortex/session-memory.md` (runtime write, per-project)
- `$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.gitignore` (append)
